items.briefing:
Australian healthcare organisations should be aware that stolen medical records continue to be highly valued on criminal marketplaces, making patient data a prime target for attackers. Separately, a vulnerability in Check Point VPN software has been actively exploited since early May — if your organisation uses this product, check with your IT team that patches have been applied promptly.

Law firms are also being increasingly targeted by extortion groups, which is relevant for any Australian legal or professional services organisation. As a practical tip: if you use an AI assistant like Microsoft Copilot, Claude, or Gemini, be cautious about unexpected prompts or unusual behaviour, as attackers have recently attempted to deliver malware through these platforms.

featured.title: Healthcare data fuels underground cybercrime economy
featured.quote: Stolen Australian patient records now traded with ransomware access, escalating hospital breach risks.
